texto: Laws alone can not secure freedom of expression
autor: in order that every man present his views without penalty there must be spirit of tolerance in the entire population.
explicacao: Citação de in order that every man present his views without penalty there must be spirit of tolerance in the entire population. sobre temas ligados a reflexao. “Laws alone can not secure freedom of expression” articula reflexao, albert-einstein, alone em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como reflexao.
